positive: A retro-futuristic depiction of a chrome-plated flying car navigating through a neon-drenched cyberpunk cityscape at night. The style should be highly detailed vector art, inspired by 1980s synthwave aesthetics, with strong geometric patterns and deep blues and magentas.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy lines, photo-realistic
